mapper.sql: id, module_name, operation_type, operation_name, request_method, request_uri, controller_method, request_params, response_result, success, error_message, operator_id, operator_name, ip_address, user_agent, cost_time, create_time, update_time, deleted
mapper.select: SELECT FROM sys_operation_log WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0

SELECT FROM sys_operation_log
ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_operation_log (module_name, operation_type, operation_name, request_method, request_uri, controller_method, request_params, response_result, success, error_message, operator_id, operator_name, ip_address, user_agent, cost_time) VALUES (#{moduleName}, #{operationType}, #{operationName}, #{requestMethod}, #{requestUri}, #{controllerMethod}, #{requestParams}, #{responseResult}, #{success}, #{errorMessage}, #{operatorId}, #{operatorName}, #{ipAddress}, #{userAgent}, #{costTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_operation_log SET deleted = 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
